creator: bruno@ruomad.net
text:
Well, I did manage to have a 0.9.9 version that builds... but openca-ocspd does not against this new version because of the changes (and I'm mostly interested in the ocspd server).

I'll try to fix it but I'll have to ask upstream how to adapt openca-ocspd.

In the meantime, I still think it would be good to fix the 0.9.2 version (as my previous patches are in deed incorrect).
What do you think ?
